source.sqlReaderQuery: select table_schema, table_name from information_schema.tables where table_schema = 'dbo'

sqlReaderQuery.value: select Order_Id, First_Name, Inserted_Date from dbo.orders where Inserted_Date >'@{activity('Lookup1').output.firstRow.max_inserted_date}'

SELECT * FROM orders 
WHERE created_at >= '@{pipeline().parameters.starttime}'
AND created_at < '@{pipeline().parameters.endtime}'
